Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-26 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
LINC ranks #1 with an exceptional 95.4 score, driven by extraordinary long-term returns of 1,467% over 10 years and 504% over 5 years, with consistent acceleration across all timeframes (21% in 1 month to 167% in 1 year). The stock shows clean momentum signals, confirmed volatility, and outperforms SPY by 153-1,247% depending on the timeframe, while trading above all major moving averages. CF ranks #2 with a 75% 1-year return but shows weakness in the 6-month period (43%) and concerning 10-year underperformance versus QQQ (-167%), suggesting its momentum is recent rather than sustained. Both stocks pass multiple momentum ratio thresholds and maintain all SMA alignment, but LINC's multi-decade outperformance and acceleration pattern stands in sharp contrast to CF's more cyclical profile. The data indicates LINC represents the type of persistent secular trend this long-term ranker is designed to identify, while CF appears to be in a strong cyclical upswing with less historical conviction.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

Click column headers to sort  |  Score = percentile composite: returns + ratio passes + bad-SPY resilience  |  SMA ✓ = price above all SMAs (30/50/100/200)  |  Ratio = short-term momentum consistency (out of 5 tests)  |  M = momentum signal (sortable) —  ● clean  ● stalling  ● overextended  |  V = volume confirmation (sortable) —  ● confirmed  ● normal  ○ thin  |  PB = entry timing: down day on strong stock (sortable by 1d return) —  ● buy today  ○ none  |  OL = theme overlap vs owned tickers —  ● overlap  ○ clear
